Smoldering Brand  
 

Lore Item Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY SECONDARY
Skill: 1H Blunt Atk Delay: 22
DMG: 9 Dmg Bonus: 35
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
STR: +3
Effect: Burn (Combat, Casting Time: Instant)
WT: 5.0 Size: SMALL
Class: ALL except BER
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

Skill: 1H Blunt Atk Delay: 22
DMG: 9 Dmg Bonus: 35
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.

Effect: Burn (Combat, Casting Time: Instant)
WT: 5.0 Size: SMALL
Class: ALL except BER
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

Item Type:1H Blunt
Light:Tiny Glowing Skull
Stackable:No
Merchant Value:12 pp 7 gp 5 sp 8 cp
Tribute:180
Lucy Entry By:Kerasota
Item Updated By:Gidono
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2022-01-10 07:21:06
Page Updated:Sat Nov 1st, 2025

Expansion: Original
Average Price: 50pp Pricing Data...
Rarity: Common
Level to Attain: 40
[Drops | Comments ]

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

Ruins of Old Paineel (The Hole)
NPC Name
a ratman guard
a spirit of the old city
a spirit of the ruins
a temple researcher
an elemental harvester
Slizik the Mighty

Zone Name
Ruins of Old Paineel (The Hole)

snailish
4,580 posts
vladire wrote:
Dropped from an elemental harvester on Ragefire TLP server today.



Updated, thanks. Can anyone confirm when in Progression server timelines versions of the Hole change up? As far as we know, elemental harvester does not exist on live servers.

We need a modern item window pic of this item.

We could use a shot of someone wielding this, though other threads complain about it looking like a torch. Since a brand is a torch... that makes sense.
▲ Page top
Must Be VERY Rare
QuoteReply
# Jun 02 2004 at 12:02 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591800596180
113 posts
I've killed scads of elemental warriors, crusaders, & monstrosities in The Hole, & have never yet see one of these. Until I actually see one drop there, I'm sceptical that they do at all.
▲ Page top
Must Be VERY Rare, (but is for real)
QuoteReply
# Feb 10 2010 at 7:33 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1618186627876
Scholar
104 posts
I obtained the Smoldering Brand years ago when the hole was still relatively new. I happily passed it down to my alts and was actually thinking about it the other day because I had long since sold it probably for less than its worth. Its a great blunt weapon for starting a new char. It has a relatively short delay with a nice little proc and majority of char classes can use it. It can help you blow past the first 1-25 levels or so. And now with DS and haste potions and such you can add even more dps :) Unless they changed the loot this item is for real. If your boxing tunes it prob wont make too big a difference, but, if your tooling around solo or with a merc. And it actually procs relatively frequent as well. Its not like that stupid 2HB warrior huge delay slow hammer that your lucky if it slowed the mob before its at 20% health and running away even when your hasted. The proc of the weapon seems to do more dmg than the weapon itself at lower levels. Its hard to say if its worth camping this item nowadays with the availability of newer weapons, but, if you ever get ahold of one pass it down. If I remember correctly we where in that room with the shallow pool of water where the non kos npc guy is when it dropped. I have no clue the name of the npc it dropped from though. And, if that ain't enough, :), the torch graphic actually has a flame with smoke eminating from it so you can be the coolest looking noob(L1-alt)!!! Almost forget to mention its a pretty decent light source as well.

Edited, Mar 9th 2010 2:02am by Harmoniq
▲ Page top
RE: Must Be VERY Rare
QuoteReply
# Jun 06 2004 at 8:47 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591793904004
2 posts
I have never seen the elementals drop them. The ghosts farther down in drop them fairly regularly (I average about 1 brand per trip to the Hole). Due to the zone revamp, it is quite possible that Alla's information is simply out-dated. When a ghost is wielding one, it will have it equipped.

Just bought one of these in ec on the nameless server for 250pp. Did several different price check's in different zones, and got responses ranging from 100pp to 300 on it's value. Dont know if this is only on the nameless, but 200 or so pp for a weapon of this quality amazes me.

Shimor Savagewolf
Halfling Druid
Forged Horsemen
The Nameless

Just got one of these in a trade today. Great weapon for training my bard's much neglected 1hb skill. I'm dual wielding it with my crystaline spider fang or crystallized sword and dishin out a good bit of hurt.

Ya, I know, it'll add to my aggro. But right now I don't worry too much about that. Later I may...

# Nov 29 2001 at 12:51 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592247032656
224 posts
Burn
Decrease Hit Points (HP) from 11 (L4) to 14 (L10)


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Classes: Mag (L4)

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Skill: Evocation
Allowable Targets: All

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Range to Target: 200 feet

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Resistance Check: Fire + 20

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Mana Required: 15
Spell Duration: Instant
Casting Time: 1.75 seconds
Spell Recovery: 2.50 seconds

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Spell cast on you: You feel your skin blister and burn.
Spell cast on someone: Soandso's skin blisters and burns.
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Nov 09 2001 at 2:21 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Anyone know around how much these ******* sell for on VZ? thanks
Interesting...
QuoteReply
# Oct 05 2001 at 11:53 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1593966052645
8 posts
My rogue hit 13 today in OoM. Finally having duel wield, I run back to FP and swim to the rogue guild. Swimming back, after talking to some of the NPC's for quests and such, I remember "Hey, I have duel wield!", so I equip the brand in my offhand. Well, suprise suprise - The brands graphic is no longer a torch, but a wicked velium spear looking thing with nasty spikes on top!

After a bit of testing, this only works if you are under water and equip the brand in your offhand. Goes away after you zone, but works exactly like the brand. Not sure if it's a bug or not.

Just found that interesting :)

Amaranth
▲ Page top
RE: Interesting...
QuoteReply
# Jan 18 2002 at 10:02 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591750106032
View User Forum
Scholar
221 posts
Um, that "wicked Velium-looking spear" is a graphics glitch on all items with that torch graphic. I have only noticed this issue in Everfrost and Halas, but there are multiple glitches with torches and lighting that have existed for quite some time.
▲ Page top
RE: Interesting...
QuoteReply
# Oct 22 2001 at 9:58 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593361293736

It will do That to ANY Torch Under Water try it.... Theres a Staff with wings to i'm not sure how to get yet

this is a very nice weapon. it has a proc that goes off more often than a velium wep, and with it being compatable to any class/race im sure that this wep will become even more desireable. now i dont care what anyone says, most of the peeps that complane about a peice of armour or a weapon just want them. so that is my 2cp worth::)

Just to clear this up a little, everything procs with the same frequency. This does more damage than the velium proc.

QuoteReply
# Nov 22 2001 at 4:20 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591764236019
99 posts
Not true at all I have a Glowing Black Sword and a Wakizashi od the Frozen Skies and the GBS procs way more often probly seven or eight procs a fight where as the Wak procs up to four times a fight for me but lots of times it doesn't even proc once.

RE: Procs
QuoteReply
# Dec 09 2001 at 2:39 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591763500733
View User Forum
69 posts
That is because the GBS adds +20 dexterity. Higer dex makes your weapons proc more often.
▲ Page top
#Flyhalfer, Posted: Jan 06 2002 at 9:44 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) He is a ranger so he is duel weilding them. Which means that the +20 dex applies to both weapons for procing.
RE: Procs
QuoteReply
# Jun 21 2002 at 4:18 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591778271019
View User Forum
337 posts
It does not need to strike to proc.
Have this weapon on my ranger atm, and have passed around all my characters, to quickly raise their 1hb skills. More often than not this weapon procs with only damage done being that of the proc.

Yes, flame away the old ac line of trash, a strike for "0" does not register. BAH, if it does not register it is not a strike. That is like a slap you do not feel, were you actually slapped?

Procs from the beginning
QuoteReply
# May 31 2001 at 1:11 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
I equipped my monk with one of these from the very beginning and it's been procing a few times at level 1. Only doing 10 points at 1, but I figure that by lvl 4, it'll start doing closer to its 14dd I suppose. Very nice weapon and I'm not overly concerned with weight yet. I carry an EE Bag for that. Just need to make sure the rest of my equipment isn't too heavy. I'm doing ok so far.
▲ Page top
Dropped
QuoteReply
# May 28 2001 at 6:04 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593965869700
Scholar
49 posts
Dropped in the Hole last night off an elemental crusader, conned blue from level 47, probably around 45. We had 15 people and were camped in the huge room with the castle... come into the big eerie room, hold to the left wall, and follow the broken ridge left and down to a plataeu at the base of the castle. We were pulling wanderering fiends, elementals, and golems from outside the base of the castle and from inside the first floor -- knocking back the xp like water, considering we were splitting it 3 ways.

Most of the good items in the Hole are on a random loot table, like you find in Dalnir, or some of the items in Karnor's. That means any mob in the zone, including the ones right at the entrance, can drop it (but you can't get out without an evac'er, so it's not like that's a whole bunch of help). The nice thing about smoldering brand is that you can see the elemental wielding it, which will trigger some instant and excited spam from your group members. Heck, at first I thought this was our enchanter with an illusion -- til it clobbered our tank for double 105s.

Oh, in about 3.5 hours, we got 1 smoldering brand, 1 earthen blade, about 4 elemental binders, 1 Loam Cap. And that included time for a huge evac and CR when we lost the chanter on one nasty spawn. This is a great place to hunt -- and the rogue that won the roll is now very happy.

Maladamuk Heartmender
Gnomish Cleric of the 48th Ring
Storm's Justice
Karana Server
